content:
<USER_REQUEST>
Write a full medical article for the title: "[의학전문칼럼] 갑상선 기능 저하증 증상과 피해야 할 음식". Return ONLY the raw HTML.
</USER_REQUEST>
<ADDITIONAL_METADATA>
The current local time is: 2026-06-17T22:29:06+09:00.
</ADDITIONAL_METADATA>

📌 핵심 요약

갑상선 기능 저하증은 체내 대사를 조절하는 호르몬이 부족해져 만성 피로, 체중 증가, 추위 민감성 등을 유발하는 질환입니다. 특히 식단 관리가 중요한데, 약물 흡수를 방해하거나 호르몬 합성을 저해할 수 있는 고이트로젠 함유 채소(생양배추 등), 과도한 요오드(해조류), 콩류의 섭취에 주의해야 합니다. 올바른 식습관과 꾸준한 호르몬 치료를 병행하면 일상생활의 활력을 완전히 되찾을 수 있습니다.

최근 들어 충분한 수면을 취해도 피로가 풀리지 않거나, 식사량을 줄였음에도 체중이 늘어나 고민이신가요? 날씨가 춥지 않은데도 유독 혼자만 추위를 타고 피부가 푸석해지는 것을 느낀다면 단순한 노화나 스트레스가 아닐 수 있습니다. 우리 몸의 에너지 대사를 관장하는 '갑상선'에 빨간불이 켜졌다는 신호일 수 있기 때문입니다. 갑상선 기능 저하증은 전 세계적으로 수많은 사람들이 앓고 있는 흔한 내분비 질환 중 하나지만, 그 증상이 서서히 나타나 방치하기 쉽습니다. 오늘은 100plus.kr 의학전문칼럼에서 갑상선 기능 저하증의 명확한 증상과 함께, 환자들이 무심코 섭취했다가 증상을 악화시킬 수 있는 '피해야 할 음식'들에 대해 의학적 근거를 바탕으로 상세히 짚어보겠습니다.

1. 갑상선 기능 저하증, 왜 발생하며 어떤 증상을 유발할까?

📚 최신 의학 논문 팩트체크 (References)

  • Jonklaas, J., et al. (2014). Guidelines for the Treatment of Hypothyroidism: Prepared by the American Thyroid Association Task Force on Thyroid Hormone Replacement. Thyroid, 24(12), 1670-1751.
  • Messina, M., & Redmond, G. (2006). Effects of soy protein and soybean isoflavones on thyroid function in healthy adults and hypothyroid patients: a review of the relevant literature. Thyroid, 16(3), 249-258.
  • Leung, A. M., & Braverman, L. E. (2014). Consequences of excess iodine. Nature Reviews Endocrinology, 10(3), 136-142.

🔍 연관 검색어: #갑상선기능저하증 #갑상선기능저하증증상 #갑상선에나쁜음식 #고이트로젠 #하시모토갑상선염 #만성피로원인

The instructions are clear; I must adhere strictly to the requested format for the article. **Clarifying Subagent Roles** I've clarified the conflicting instructions regarding the output format for the Korean article. I will structure the article according to the structure specified in the instructions. **Composing the ctions** I'm now expanding the Korean section with more details. I've focused on explaining how subtle symptoms lead to oversight, and must highlight that many patients attribute these to age or stress. I need to explain the importance of a blood test. I'm focusing on the Korean sections about goiter, voice changes, and cholesterol. **Refining Final Korean Content** I'm now integrating the Korean text, particularly addressing foods to avoid, and the warning about "goitrogens." I am working to complete the Korean text for the warning section, and preparing the raw HTML for the call. I will emphasize the importance of early diagnosis and that consultation with an endocrinologist can prevent complications. **Refining Korean Text** I'm now refining the Korean text with details on goitrogens, soy, and iodine. I am focusing on making the details on food preparation, isoflavones, and iodine intake clear and accurate. The text will emphasize safe consumption practices. **Refining Treatment Guidance** I'm now refining the Korean text, specifically the guidance on treatment with levothyroxine. I'm focusing on providing clear instructions for medication timing and dietary considerations, emphasizing that medication is essential for treatment. I am highlighting the importance of medication adherence, and the role of a balanced diet. **Finalizing Article Content** I've finished the Korean text and references, formatting the raw HTML output. I've re-confirmed that the `send_message` call will contain the complete, well-formatted HTML, including the Korean translations and updated reference list. My focus is on delivering a clean, readable, accurate article. **Confirming Raw HTML Output** I've clarified the crucial point regarding raw HTML output; I will bypass `send_message` and output it directly. The key is strict adherence to the instruction "Return ONLY the raw HTML as your response," confirming the system will parse my response directly. I'll include the previous raw HTML output, formatted as requested.
